name: r-assistant
description: Claude Code skill for clinical oncology statistical analysis in R: survival analysis (Kaplan-Meier, Cox, RMST), reverse-KM follow-up, IPD reconstruction from published curves, baseline tables, and manuscript-quality figures and tables.

skills.description: Clinical oncology statistical analysis in R — Kaplan-Meier, Cox, RMST, IPD reconstruction, baseline tables, manuscript figures.
